title: aeridium odorum
side_effects: Aeridium odorum can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. Prolonged exposure to the plant's oils may cause headaches, dizziness, and nausea in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of the plant may lead to anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction. Additionally, consuming any part of the aeridium odorum plant can cause vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain due to its toxic compounds.
